narrative_scene_description: The Guru Nanak Eye Bank is a large institutional building characterized by a light green upper facade, reddish-brown lower brickwork, and prominent dark domes on its roofline. Adjacent to the building’s lower facade are pedestrians sitting on benches and steps near several metal-grilled entrances. To the left of the building is a paved road where a yellow and black auto-rickshaw, bearing the license plate OD 02 AE 3662 and the word 'Bhubaneswar' in Odia on its windshield, is positioned. Beside the path of the auto-rickshaw, a white Maruti Swift is parked along the left edge of the street. To the left of the parked car is a road junction where a large signboard for the Guru Nanak Eye Bank stands in both English and Odia. Adjacent to this junction on the left side of the road is an open park area. Within this park, a statue of a man stands on a pedestal under a white classical-style pavilion with a tiered roof. To the left of the pavilion is a yellow signpost displaying a circular 'No Parking' symbol with 'ନୋ ପାର୍କିଂ' in Odia script. Across the road from the park, a red hatchback is parked beside a sidewalk with a black-and-white striped curb.
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip (00:00 - 00:10), the camera records from a vehicle moving slowly past a large institutional building with a light green upper facade and dark domes. Pedestrians are seen walking along the sidewalk and sitting on the building's front steps. Shortly after (00:06), a yellow and black auto-rickshaw crosses the frame from right to left, followed by a man on a bicycle at 00:08. As the vehicle continues forward (00:25), the sign 'GURU NANAK EYE BANK' becomes clearly visible on the building facade, and a white Maruti Swift is seen parked on the left side of the road. Further along the road (00:28), a large directional signboard for the eye bank appears on the right as the street opens into a wider junction. Near the end of the clip (00:29 - 00:32), the vehicle passes a landscaped park area on the left that contains a statue under a white canopy pavilion and a circular 'No Parking' sign, while a red car is parked on the right side of the street.
